subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that this Day is His Day, and this Manifestation His Manifestation, and these verses His verses, and this Book His Book, by His command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله ان الیوم یومه و الظهور ظهوره و الایات آیاته و الکتاب کتابه بامره
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @station of the Manifestation of God, @the power of words; of speech
